nodes.context: A set of the Crips gang based in Watts, Los Angeles, active since the 1970s.
A Bloods set in Watts, Los Angeles, rival of the Grape Street Watts Crips.
A Crips set involved in a conflict with Grape Street Watts Crips after a murder in 2008.

edges.context: Described as the most violent and long lasting feud between two gangs in the Watts area.
The murder of Grape Street member Brandon Bullard by East Coast Crips sparked a war resulting in casualties.
